description: Showcase your creativity with this versatile email template, perfect for a freelancer looking to display their portfolio. The two-column layout allows you to highlight your projects, design work, and photography in a sleek and organized manner. The light, white and grey tones offer a clean backdrop, while pops of pink and red add a modern, artistic touch. The template also features a slab design for a structured, professional look. It's suitable for use in various fields such as news, blog & magazines, software and technology, service promotion, and marketing & design. Whether you're a graphic designer, illustrator, or blogger, this template is a fantastic tactic to highlight your work and promote your services.
short_description: Showcase your creative work with this versatile email template, ideal for fields like news, blogs, software, technology, marketing & design. Highlight your best projects in graphics, design, photography with a two-column layout against a light-grey backdrop. Suitable for bloggers and designers.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
